# Inconvo Next.js Vercel AI SDK Integration ## Background You need to build a Next.js application that integrates with Inconvo using the Vercel AI SDK to create an interactive data agent chat interface. ## Requirements * Initialize a Next.js application (App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, no `src` directory) in `/home/user/app`. * Install the required packages: `ai`, `@ai-sdk/react`, and `@inconvoai/vercel-ai-sdk`. * Create a backend API route at `app/api/chat/route.ts` that uses `streamText` from `ai` and `inconvoDataAgent` from `@inconvoai/vercel-ai-sdk`. * The API route must configure the agent with `process.env.INCONVO_AGENT_ID`, a `userIdentifier` of `"user-123"`, and a `userContext` with `organisationId: 1`. * Create a frontend chat interface in `app/page.tsx` using the `useChat` hook from `@ai-sdk/react`. * The UI must include an input field with the placeholder "Ask about your data..." and display the conversation messages. * For tool calls, if the tool is an Inconvo tool and its state is `output-available`, the UI should render a generic `
Data Visualization Available
`. ## Implementation Guide 1. Run `npx create-next-app@latest /home/user/app --ts --tailwind --eslint --app --no-src-dir --import-alias "@/*"` to create the project. 2. Add the necessary dependencies. 3. Implement the `POST` handler in `app/api/chat/route.ts` to convert messages and call `streamText` with the `inconvoDataAgent` tool, returning `result.toUIMessageStreamResponse()`. 4. Implement the chat UI in `app/page.tsx` by iterating over `messages` from `useChat` and rendering user/AI text, as well as tool results. ## Constraints * Project path: `/home/user/app` * Start command: `npm run build && npm start` * Port: `3000` * Environment: Use Node.js v24. * Note: Do not configure real API keys, the verifier will only check the static UI and code implementation. ## Integrations * None

The user wants me to build a Next.js application that integrates with Inconvo using the Vercel AI SDK. Let me break down the requirements: 1. Initialize a Next.js app in `/home/user/app` with: - App Router - TypeScript - Tailwind CSS - No `src` directory 2. Install packages: `ai`, `@ai-sdk/react`, and `@inconvoai/vercel-ai-sdk` 3. Create backend API route at `app/api/chat/route.ts`: - Uses `streamText` from `ai` - Uses `inconvoDataAgent` from `@inconvoai/vercel-ai-sdk` - Configure with: - `process.env.INCONVO_AGENT_ID` - `userIdentifier: "user-123"` - `userContext: { organisationId: 1 }` - Return `result.toUIMessageStreamResponse()` 4. Create frontend chat interface in `app/page.tsx`: - Uses `useChat` hook from `@ai-sdk/react` - Input field with placeholder "Ask about your data..." - Display conversation messages - For tool calls: if tool is Inconvo tool and state is `output-available`, render `
Data Visualization Available
` Let me start by creating a todo list to track this multi-step task.
I'll build a Next.js application with Inconvo integration using the Vercel AI SDK. Let me create a todo list to track this implementation.

Create backend API route at app/api/chat/route.ts with streamText and inconvoDataAgent
Create frontend chat interface in app/page.tsx with useChat hook and message rendering
Verify the application builds successfully

part.text: All tasks are completed. Let me now present the completion result to the user.

input.result:
I've successfully built the Next.js application with Inconvo integration using the Vercel AI SDK. Here's what was implemented: ## Project Structure - **Location**: `/home/user/app` - **Tech Stack**: Next.js 16 (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS ## Key Components ### 1. Backend API Route (`app/api/chat/route.ts`) - Uses `streamText` from the `ai` package for streaming responses - Integrates `inconvoDataAgent` from `@inconvoai/vercel-ai-sdk` - Configured with: - `process.env.INCONVO_AGENT_ID` for agent identification - `userIdentifier: "user-123"` for user tracking - `userContext: { organisationId: 1 }` for context - Returns responses using `result.toUIMessageStreamResponse()` ### 2. Frontend Chat Interface (`app/page.tsx`) - Uses `useChat` hook from `@ai-sdk/react` - Features: - Input field with placeholder "Ask about your data..." - Message display with user/AI distinction - Tool result rendering for Inconvo tools - When an Inconvo tool has `output-available` state, displays `
Data Visualization Available
` ### 3. Dependencies Installed - `ai` - Core Vercel AI SDK - `@ai-sdk/react` - React hooks for AI SDK - `@inconvoai/vercel-ai-sdk` - Inconvo integration - `@ai-sdk/openai` - OpenAI provider ## Build Status ✅ Build completed successfully with TypeScript validation passing The application is ready to run with `npm run build && npm start` on port 3000. Note: Real API keys will need to be configured for actual functionality, but the code structure and UI implementation are complete as specified.
